mechanics.excerpt: When choosing armor; cost is not the only factor to take into consid eration as the armors that provide the best protection are also the bulkiest and significantly limit mobility: On the other hand_ the lightest armors have Iittle impact on movement or dexterity and provide adequate protection against light pistois (and reduce the effectiveness of heavier weapons): Armor comes in number of styles_ The armored vest iIS probably the best known and most common; protecting only the wearer' torso, though some of the heavier vests fully cover the upper half of the body: with coverage extending down past the groin.
